calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Turrini for Wendy Flegal.

Mr. Turrini explained that there was another Attorney handling administration of the Estate, that the Attorney asked him to do the taxes, that at his office bills get automatically sent out, that the bill got automatically sent out to the Administratix and that she paid it. Mr. Turrini also stated that his staff now knows not to bill Estates. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
